summary: Verified all 4 refactored tab components (OverviewTab, CoverageTab, LocationsTab, MarginsTab) work correctly after extraction from monolithic DistributorDetail.js file. All tabs render properly, display correct data, and maintain full functionality including add/edit/delete dialogs and interactive features.

details: Basic Information card displays correctly (GSTIN, PAN, Billing Address, Registered Address)
Contact Information card displays correctly (Primary/Secondary contacts)
Commercial Terms card displays correctly (Payment Terms, Credit Days, Credit Limit, Security Deposit)
Coverage table displays 6 cities with State, City, Status columns
Add Coverage button (data-testid='add-coverage-btn') works
Add Coverage dialog opens with State/City selector
Delete buttons visible for each coverage row
Location cards display correctly (1 location: Test LOC-001)
Add Location button (data-testid='add-location-btn') works
Add Location dialog opens with full form (Name, State, City, Address, Contact)
Delete button visible on location card
City selector (data-testid='margin-city-select') works
Margin table shows 9 entries for Gurugram
Active & Ongoing toggle (data-testid='show-active-margins-toggle') works
Add Price Entry button (data-testid='add-margin-entry-btn') works
Edit dialog opens correctly with pre-filled data
Delete buttons visible for each margin row
Copy to City functionality accessible
All tabs clickable and switch content correctly
Tab counts accurate (Coverage: 6, Locations: 1, Margin Matrix: 9)

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully reduced DistributorDetail.js from ~5,350 to ~4,340 lines
Tab components properly import shared constants from constants.js
All data-testid attributes preserved for automated testing
Props are correctly passed from parent to child components
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing distributor 'Test' (DIST-0002)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 refactored tab components (OverviewTab, CoverageTab, LocationsTab, MarginsTab) are working correctly. The refactoring preserved all functionality including: tab navigation, data display, add/edit/delete dialogs, city selector in margins, active/ongoing toggle filter. Components are located in /app/frontend/src/components/distributor/ directory with shared constants in constants.js.
